description: Mock returns fixture name - test/fixture-name coupling anti-pattern
code:
def test_mock_returns_fixture_name():
    # Anti-pattern: mock returns the fixture/test name
    # This creates coupling between test identity and mock behavior
    mock_service = Mock()
    mock_service.get_name.return_value = 'test_mock_returns_fixture_name'
    result = mock_service.get_name()
    assert result == 'test_mock_returns_fixture_name'  # Coupling detected
